However, several critical red flags indicate this is not an active manufacturing facility. The insured workforce is completely null (unreported), and its registered address is a specific room ('Room 405, Building 2') within Taizhou, which is entirely incongruous with heavy manufacturing. Furthermore, its business scope is extraordinarily brief, limited solely to 'production of wind and photovoltaic complementary systems'.
